title: Sichuan Crispy Fermented Dumplings
description: A Chinese recipe featuring crispy fermented dumplings with a crunchy topping and a savory filling. This is a unique dessert-free snack.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the fermented Indian nuts, crispy fermented crumbly, soy sauce, sugar, water, flour, egg, and salt to form a sticky dough.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into small balls and flatten each ball slightly into a disk shape.
Heat a large non-stick pan with 1-2 inches of oil over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, add a few dumplings to the pan and fry until they are golden brown and crispy.
Remove the dumplings from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the dumplings hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
Repeat the process with the remaining dough and oil.
Serve the dumplings immediately and enjoy!
